subcodes.first_line: When We arrived at the Prison, We desired to convey unto all the messages of their Lord... and further, regarding the hidden knowledge, according to wisdom: whatsoever hath been revealed in Persian must be carried out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا وردنا السجن اردنا ان نبلغ الکل رسالات ربهم ... و دیگر در فقرهٴ علم مکنون حسب الحکم آنکه آنچه در آن فارسی نازل شده باید عمل شود
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @personal instructions
